ddls:
CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "yearkey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the year */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is a leap year */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams active in the league during that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yearkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "leaguekey" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  "dissolved" TEXT /* Year the league was dissolved */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league was primarily based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league (if available) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaguekey")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "teamkey" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "leaguekey" TEXT /* Key of the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "dissolved" TEXT /* Year the team was dissolved */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team (if available) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teamkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "parkkey" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the park is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the park is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the park is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the park */,
  "built" TEXT /* Year the park was built */,
  "renovated" TEXT /* Year the park was last renovated */,
  "architect" TEXT /* Name of the architect who designed the park */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the park (if available) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the park's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parkkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "yearkey" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "teamkey" TEXT /* Key of the team */,
  "leaguekey" TEXT /* Key of the league */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "openings" INTEGER /* Total number of openings (games with spectators) */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team in that season */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances in that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_teamkey FOREIGN KEY ("teamkey") REFERENCES teams ("teamkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_yearkey FOREIGN KEY ("yearkey") REFERENCES years ("yearkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_leaguekey FOREIGN KEY ("leaguekey") REFERENCES leagues ("leaguekey")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "parkkey" TEXT /* Key of the park where the game was played */,
  "teamkey_home" TEXT /* Key of the home team */,
  "teamkey_away" TEXT /* Key of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_teamkey_away FOREIGN KEY ("teamkey_away") REFERENCES teams ("teamkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_teamkey_home FOREIGN KEY ("teamkey_home") REFERENCES teams ("teamkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_parkkey FOREIGN KEY ("parkkey") REFERENCES parks ("parkkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_park_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-park history entry */,
  "teamkey" TEXT /* Key of the team */,
  "parkkey" TEXT /* Key of the park */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the team started playing at the park */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the team stopped playing at the park */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the team changing parks (e.g., expansion, renovation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_park_history_teamkey FOREIGN KEY ("teamkey") REFERENCES teams ("teamkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_park_history_parkkey FOREIGN KEY ("parkkey") REFERENCES parks ("parkkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., season, game, park) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics entry */,
  "teamkey" TEXT /* Key of the team */,
  "yearkey" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "leaguekey" TEXT /* Key of the league */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average (ERA) */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins at home */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins away */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses at home */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses away */,
  "home_ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties at home */,
  "away_ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties away */,
  "home_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored at home */,
  "away_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored away */,
  "home_runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed at home */,
  "away_runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed away */,
  "home_batting_average" REAL /* Batting average at home */,
  "away_batting_average" REAL /* Batting average away */,
  "home_era" REAL /* Earned run average at home */,
  "away_era" REAL /* Earned run average away */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_leaguekey FOREIGN KEY ("leaguekey") REFERENCES leagues ("leaguekey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_yearkey FOREIGN KEY ("yearkey") REFERENCES years ("yearkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_teamkey FOREIGN KEY ("teamkey") REFERENCES teams ("teamkey")
)
